name: American Board of Forensic Entomology
function: Certifies North American forensic entomologists (Diplomate, Member, Technician) and can revoke certification for casework beyond scope.

name: European Association for Forensic Entomology
function: Professional body coordinating forensic-entomology practice and standards in Europe.

name: North American Forensic Entomology Association
function: Hosts certification examinations and convenes North American forensic entomologists.

name: NIST OSAC Forensic Entomology Task Group
function: Develops documentary standards for forensic entomology within the US standards infrastructure.

name: USDA APHIS Plant Protection and Quarantine
function: Determines what plants and pests may be imported or moved interstate and runs federal quarantines under the Plant Protection Act.

name: Russian Entomological Society
function: Chartered Russian Empire learned society that helped turn insect classification and applied entomology into administrative knowledge for pest governance.

name: International Plant Protection Convention Secretariat
function: Maintains the ISPMs that serve as the phytosanitary benchmark under the WTO SPS Agreement.

name: U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service
function: Lists and protects endangered insects under the ESA and enforces CITES insect-trade controls.

name: Xerces Society for Invertebrate Conservation
function: Advocates for invertebrate listings and petitions, including the bumblebee CESA effort.

name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
function: Administers the California Endangered Species Act, whose 'fish' definition reaches invertebrates after Almond Alliance.

name: EPA Office of Pesticide Programs
function: Registers pesticides and engineered insect releases under FIFRA and the Coordinated Framework.

name: European Food Safety Authority
function: Issues the safety opinions that underpin EU novel-food authorizations for edible insects.

name: Central Silk Board (India)
function: Statutory body regulating silkworm seed quality, the silk cess, and export policy under the Central Silk Board Act.
